trigger.Name: Nachalo_cin
trigger.script:
SaveAllToleranceStatus(RS_NEUTRAL)
god(1)
CreateNewDummyObject( "boevoy", "Kor1", -1, -1, CVector(1181.364, 265.343, 1295.851), Quaternion(0.0220, 0.9738, -0.1268, 0.1875),1 )
local moverId = CreateNewObject { prototypeName = "cinematicMover", objName = "" } local mover = GetEntityByID( moverId ) local controlledObj = GetEntityByName("Kor1") if controlledObj then mover:SetObjAndPath( controlledObj:GetId(), "Kor_1", 14 ) end
CreateNewDummyObject( "brick_debris1", "CamTochka", -1, -1, CVector(1429.193, 281.116, 1324.542), Quaternion(0, 0, 0, 0), 0)
local Plf = GetPlayerVehicle() local PlfID = GetPlayerVehicleId()
local CToch = GetEntityByName("CamTochka") local CTochID = CToch:GetId()
Fly("Nachalo_cam01", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 12, 1, 0 ) FlyLinked( "Nachalo_cam02", CTochID, 9, 0, 0, PlfID ) Fly("Nachalo_cam03", CINEMATIC_NO_AIM, 0, 8, 0, 1 ) StartCinematic() UpdateCinematic(1)
TActivate("Nachalo_cin_vehicle") TActivate("Nachalo_cin_vehicle2") TActivate( "Nachalo_cin_end" )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Nachalo_cin_vehicle
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetPosition( CVector(1368.020, 273.745, 1368.153)) vehPlayer:SetRotation(Quaternion(0.034, 0.562, -0.021, 0.826)) vehPlayer:SetExternalPathByName("Port_path")
end
AddCinematicMessage( 0, 0.5 )
trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.script:

trigger:Deactivate()

trigger.Name: Nachalo_cin_end
trigger.script:
local vehPlayer = GetPlayerVehicle() if vehPlayer then vehPlayer:SetCustomLinearVelocity(0) vehPlayer:SetThrottle(0) vehPlayer:SetExternalPathByName("Port_path") vehPlayer:PlaceToEndOfPath("Port_path") end
local Kirpich = GetEntityByName("CamTochka") if Kirpich then Kirpich:Remove() end
god(0)
RestoreAllToleranceStatus()
TActivate("Kosmodrom_cin")
StopPlayingCustomMusic()
SetCameraBehindPlayerVehicle()
TakeQuest("Baikonur_quest1")
AddHistory( "r4_Pustinya_History_01" ) AddFadingMsgId( "fm_history_got" )
TDeactivate("Nachalo_cin_vehicle") TDeactivate("Nachalo_cin_vehicle2")
trigger:Deactivate()
